info.name: Hydra BE — Contract Tests
info.description: E2E contract tests generated from live OpenAPI spec. Validates response schemas using Ajv.

exec: // --- Basic structure check (no schema in spec) ---
pm.test("Response body matches contract schema", function() {
catch(e) { pm.expect.fail("Response is not valid JSON"); return; }
// Handle NestJS ResponseInterceptor wrapping { success, data, meta }
var payload = (body && typeof body === "object" && body.success !== undefined && body.data !== undefined) ? body.data : body;
var ajv = new Ajv({ strict: false, allErrors: true });

  "borderless": false,

  "description": "A great bundle of cards.",
  "expansion": "WAR",
  "extendedArt": false,
  "finalPrice": 30,
  "foil": false,

  "metadata": [],

  "prerelease": false,
  "premierPlay": false,
  "stock": 0,
  "surgeFoil": false,
  "tags": [],

  "isSerialized": false,
  "isAlternateFrame": false,
  "isShowcase": false,
  "priceMxnImportation": 100.5,
  "priceMxnLocal": 80.25,
  "tcg_id": "uuid-here"
}
